title: Son Tinh and Thuy Tinh
summary: The competition between the Mountain God and the Sea God for My Nuong's hand, explaining the annual flooding phenomenon.

slides.text: The 18th Hung King had a beautiful daughter named My Nuong. The King wanted to find a talented husband for her.
slides.imagePrompt: Princess My Nuong standing in a garden, beautiful and elegant, ancient Vietnamese palace in background, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Suddenly, two gods came to ask for her hand: Son Tinh - lord of the high mountains, and Thuy Tinh - lord of the deep waters. Both possessed matchless magic.
slides.imagePrompt: Son Tinh (Mountain God) and Thuy Tinh (Sea God) standing before the King, one with earth powers, one with water powers, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: The King set a condition: 'Whoever brings the offerings first (nine-tusked elephants, nine-spurred roosters, nine-red-haired horses) shall marry My Nuong'.
slides.imagePrompt: Magical creatures: elephants with 9 tusks, roosters with 9 spurs, horses with red hair, glowing and legendary, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Son Tinh presented the offerings first and took My Nuong to the mountains. Thuy Tinh arrived later and, in a rage, raised the waters to pursue and reclaim the princess.
slides.imagePrompt: Son Tinh leading My Nuong to the mountains, Thuy Tinh behind with a massive wave and sea monsters, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: The two gods fought fiercely. As high as Thuy Tinh raised the water, Son Tinh raised the mountains even higher. Eventually, Thuy Tinh grew exhausted and had to retreat.
slides.imagePrompt: Epic battle, mountains rising against floods, thunder and lightning, Son Tinh and Thuy Tinh clashing, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Since then, every year Thuy Tinh raises the water to cause floods as revenge but always fails against Son Tinh.
slides.imagePrompt: Modern floods in Vietnam, people working together to build dikes and protect homes, symbolic struggle, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: Which region did Son Tinh rule?
Which of the following offerings was mentioned in the story?
What phenomenon does the story of Son Tinh and Thuy Tinh explain?
